metadata.name: Tumbling Cubes of Blood
metadata.author: The NG + Rovastar + Flexi + Geiss
metadata.source: The NG + Rovastar + Flexi + Geiss - Tumbling Cubes of Blood.milk

perFrameCode: bounce = below(y1,r-(aspectx-1)*0.5);y1 = y1+vy1;vy1 = if(bounce, abs(vy1)*0.96 + (r-y1-(aspectx-1)*0.5)*0.1, vy1-0.0003*60/fps);
vx1 = if(bounce, vx1 + (vr-vx1)*0.15, vx1);vr = if(bounce, vr + (vx1-vr)*0.85 , vr);vr1 = asin(vr/r);
vy1 = if(bounce, vy1 + (vr-vy1)*0.15, vy1);vr = if(bounce, vr + (vy1-vr)*0.85 , vr);vr1 = asin(vr/r);
bounce = below(x1,r-(aspecty-1)*0.5);x1 = x1+vx1;vx1 = if(bounce, abs(vx1)*0.96 + (r-x1-(aspecty-1)*0.5)*0.1, vx1);
vy1 = if(bounce, vy1 + (-vr-vy1)*0.15, vy1);vr = if(bounce, vr - (vy1+vr)*0.85 , vr);vr1 = asin(vr/r);
bounce = below(y2,r-(aspectx-1)*0.5);y2 = y2+vy2;vy2 = if(bounce, abs(vy2)*0.96 + (r-y2-(aspectx-1)*0.5)*0.1, vy2-0.0003*60/fps);
vx2 = if(bounce, vx2 + (vr-vx2)*0.15, vx2);vr = if(bounce, vr + (vx2-vr)*0.85 , vr);vr2 = asin(vr/r);
vy2 = if(bounce, vy2 + (vr-vy2)*0.15, vy2);vr = if(bounce, vr + (vy2-vr)*0.85 , vr);vr2 = asin(vr/r);
bounce = below(x2,r-(aspecty-1)*0.5);x2 = x2+vx2;vx2 = if(bounce, abs(vx2)*0.96 + (r-x2-(aspecty-1)*0.5)*0.1, vx2);
vy2 = if(bounce, vy2 + (-vr-vy2)*0.15, vy2);vr = if(bounce, vr - (vy2+vr)*0.85 , vr);vr2 = asin(vr/r);
bounce = below(y3,r-(aspectx-1)*0.5);y3 = y3+vy3;vy3 = if(bounce, abs(vy3)*0.96 + (r-y3-(aspectx-1)*0.5)*0.1, vy3-0.0003*60/fps);
vx3 = if(bounce, vx3 + (vr-vx3)*0.15, vx3);vr = if(bounce, vr + (vx3-vr)*0.85 , vr);vr3 = asin(vr/r);
vy3 = if(bounce, vy3 + (vr-vy3)*0.15, vy3);vr = if(bounce, vr + (vy3-vr)*0.85 , vr);vr3 = asin(vr/r);
bounce = below(x3,r-(aspecty-1)*0.5);x3 = x3+vx3;vx3 = if(bounce, abs(vx3)*0.96 + (r-x3-(aspecty-1)*0.5)*0.1, vx3);
vy3 = if(bounce, vy3 + (-vr-vy3)*0.15, vy3);vr = if(bounce, vr - (vy3+vr)*0.85 , vr);vr3 = asin(vr/r);
bounce = bounce*below(sqrt( sqr(x1+vx1-x2-vx2) + sqr(y1+vy1-y2-vy2)),sqrt( sqr(x1-x2) + sqr(y1-y2)));
bounce = bounce*below(sqrt( sqr(x1+vx1-x3-vx3) + sqr(y1+vy1-y3-vy3)),sqrt( sqr(x1-x3) + sqr(y1-y3)));
bounce = bounce*below(sqrt( sqr(x2+vx2-x3-vx3) + sqr(y2+vy2-y3-vy3)),sqrt( sqr(x2-x3) + sqr(y2-y3)));
